item.title: RT by @Dinosn: A stored XPATH injection vulnerability exists in opnsense's trust module. Any user if given just System: CA Manager permissions can use a bool side channel/oracle to slowly leak any sec
item.description: pA stored XPATH injection vulnerability exists in opnsense's trust module.br /br /Any user if given just System: br /CA Manager permissions can use a bool side channel/oracle to slowly leak any secret in config.xml character by character. the injection point is in the refid field of a ca object.br /

item.title: Bots constantly flooding with malware on GitHub, same stars count on the new repositories, and GitHub's process is too slow / time consuming to report all.

item.title: CitrixBleed-ing Again? NetScaler Vulnerability Under Attack
item.description: Attackers wasted little time targeting the latest memory disclosure flaw in Citrix's NetScaler products, after researchers published a proof-of-concept exploit (PoC).

item.title: JadePuffer: The First Complete LLM-Driven Ransomware Attack
item.description: An &quot;agentic threat actor&quot; successfully exploited a Langflow flaw to steal data from a production database server and encrypt other systems.

item.title: RT by @Dinosn: I found a Linux 0day vuln with @rqda_A, and $80,000+ rewarded for it by Google kernelCTF! The vuln has been surprisingly hidden for about 19 years. We've published an English version of
item.description: pI found a Linux 0day vuln with a href="https://nitter.net/rqda_A" title="rona"@rqda_A/a, and $80,000+ rewarded for it by Google kernelCTF!br /The vuln has been surprisingly hidden for about 19 years.br /We've published an English version of the blog post!br /br /a href="https://gmo-cybersecurity.co

item.title: RT by @Dinosn: 💥 Introducing "Januscape" (CVE-2026-53359) A Guest-to-Host Escape in KVM/x86 exploiting a UAF in the shadow MMU. Triggerable on both Intel and AMD hosts. Threatens x86 public clouds (GC
item.description: p💥 Introducing "Januscape" (CVE-2026-53359) br /br /A Guest-to-Host Escape in KVM/x86 exploiting a UAF in the shadow MMU. Triggerable on both Intel and AMD hosts. Threatens x86 public clouds (GCP, AWS) that expose nested virtualization. br /br /"16 years" latent. Successfully used as a 0-day explo

item.title: Summer Finance Drained of $6M in Flash Loan Exploit
item.description: DeFi vault platform Summer Finance was drained of roughly $6 million on Monday in an exploit that security firm Blockaid said its detection system flagged as it was unfolding. Blockaid posted the exploit transaction, the attacker's address and the affected Lazy Summer contracts within minutes of…

item.title: France to Stop Certifying Non-Quantum-Safe Encryption
item.description: pFrance is a href="https://www.reuters.com/legal/litigation/france-stop-certifying-products-without-quantum-safe-encryption-2026-06-16/"accelerating/a its transition to post-quantum encryption:/pblockquotepFrance&#8217;s cybersecurity agency ANSSI said on Tuesday it would stop certifying security pr

item.title: Privacy is no longer an afterthought, it is a first class goal ❤️
item.description: p&gt; Privacy is no longer an afterthought, it is a first class goalbr /br /❤️/phr /blockquotebvitalik.eth (@VitalikButerin)/bppTwo weeks ago, Ethereum researchers met in Berlin to continue charting the protocol's long-term trajectory, following along discussions with client teams in Svalbard in Apr

item.title: Strawmap focuses on: * UX (shorter slots, frame transactions, faster finality, privacy, code size increases, evm features, etc.) * Scaling (zkEVMs, new types of state, limiting state growth, new node
item.description: pStrawmap focuses on:br /* UX (shorter slots, frame transactions, faster finality, privacy, code size increases, evm features, etc.)br /* Scaling (zkEVMs, new types of state, limiting state growth, new node types (vops), new state trie, data scaling + gas limit increases)br /* PQ / Lean, preparing E
